---
title: Research
---

## Research Interests

### 1. Environmental durability of CFRP composites
- Seawater immersion and hygrothermal aging
- Hydrostatic pressure and sustained mechanical loading
- Strength degradation, moisture diffusion, and long-term service reliability

### 2. Damage and mechanical behavior of laminated composites
- Matrix cracking, interfacial debonding, and delamination
- Compression behavior, flexural behavior, and failure-mode transition
- Layup effects, size effects, and environmental coupling effects

### 3. Multiscale modeling and predictive methods
- Moisture diffusion modeling and degradation laws
- Cohesive interface simulation and progressive damage analysis
- Abaqus-based finite element modeling and strength prediction

## Academic Background

- **2026–Present**  Postdoctoral Researcher, Tsinghua University
- **2024–2025**  Joint Ph.D. Student, National University of Singapore
- **2020–2026**  Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering, Zhejiang University
